items.text:
NOTICE: Elevator Maintenance in Anderson Hall

Date: Monday, May 15
Time: 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM
Location: Anderson Hall, Main Elevator

Please be advised that the main elevator in Anderson Hall will be out of service for scheduled maintenance on May 15. During this time:

- Only the stairwells will be available for access to floors 2 through 6.
- Residents on the first floor will not be affected.
- All maintenance work will be performed by certified technicians.
- A $10 late fee will be charged for any items left in the elevator after 4:00 PM.

We apologize for any inconvenience. For questions, contact Facilities at extension 555-0199.

Thank you for your cooperation.

questions.stem: According to the notice, when will the elevator maintenance take place?

options.A: On a weekend in early May
options.B: From 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM on May 15
options.C: During the entire month of May

questions.explanation: The notice states: 'Time: 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM' and 'Date: Monday, May 15.'

questions.stem: Which of the following is NOT mentioned as a consequence of the maintenance?

options.A: Residents must use the stairwells for upper floors
options.B: A $10 fee applies to items left in the elevator after hours
options.C: Certified technicians will perform all work
options.D: The building will be closed to visitors during maintenance

questions.explanation: The notice mentions using stairwells, a $10 fee, and certified technicians, but does not mention closing the building to visitors.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about residents on the first floor?

options.A: They will not need to use the stairwells
options.B: They must evacuate during the maintenance
options.C: They will be charged a $10 fee for elevator use
options.D: They should contact Facilities for more details

questions.explanation: The notice says 'Residents on the first floor will not be affected,' implying they do not need to use the stairwells.

items.text:
NOTICE: Water Shutoff for Campus Maintenance

Date: Saturday, March 18
Time: 7:00 AM to 12:00 PM (noon)
Affected Buildings: Smith Hall, Davis Library, and the Student Union

Due to scheduled maintenance, water service will be temporarily shut off in the buildings listed above. During this time:

- All restrooms and drinking fountains in these buildings will be unavailable.
- Students and staff are advised to use facilities in nearby buildings (e.g., Johnson Gym or the Science Center).
- A $10 refund will be issued to any student who prepaid for a campus meal plan and cannot access dining facilities due to the shutoff.
- Maintenance crews will work to restore service by noon.

We apologize for the inconvenience. For more information, contact the Facilities Office at 555-0234 or visit our website.

questions.stem: According to the notice, when will the water shutoff occur?

options.A: On a weekday from 7:00 AM to noon
options.B: On a Sunday afternoon in March
options.C: On March 18 from 7:00 AM to 12:00 PM
options.D: During the entire weekend of March 18

questions.explanation: The notice states: 'Date: Saturday, March 18' and 'Time: 7:00 AM to 12:00 PM (noon).'

questions.stem: Which of the following is NOT mentioned as an affected building?
questions.explanation: The notice lists Smith Hall, Davis Library, and the Student Union as affected. Johnson Gym is mentioned as an alternative facility, not an affected building.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students with prepaid meal plans?

options.A: They will lose access to all campus dining for the day
options.B: They may receive a $10 refund due to the shutoff
options.C: They must use meal vouchers at nearby restaurants
options.D: They can access dining facilities in affected buildings

questions.explanation: The notice says a $10 refund will be issued to students who prepaid for a meal plan and cannot access dining facilities due to the shutoff, implying refunds are possible.

rejected.reason: answer_position: all 3 answers are "B" — must vary
